name: Galvanic Rapier

effects.description: Can be charged to deal 1 electric damage on a hit (once per short rest).

description: A slender sword with a hidden battery and copper wiring along the blade. Used by dueling scientists and eccentric nobles.

artwork.caption: A rapier with a faint blue glow along its edge.

provenance: Inspired by D&D 5e 'Flame Tongue', reimagined for electricity.
